f35b89fb-3cc2-4e1f-8e58-98165c82df08.name: Notes
f35b89fb-3cc2-4e1f-8e58-98165c82df08.content:
Welcome to protoLabs Studio

This is your workspace notepad. Use it to jot down ideas, track decisions, or leave notes for your team.

Quick Start

  • Board — Create features, track progress, and manage your backlog
  • Agents — AI agents pick up features and implement them in isolated branches
  • Auto-Mode — Queue features with dependencies and let agents work autonomously
  • Context Files — Drop coding standards into .automaker/context/ to guide every agent

Useful Commands

If you're using the Claude Code plugin:

  • /board — View and manage the Kanban board
  • /auto-mode start — Start autonomous feature processing
  • /orchestrate — Set up feature dependencies
  • /plan-project — Plan a full project from an idea

Create new tabs to organize your notes by topic.

76adb596-5ccb-4a32-a07f-bbcfce03826b.name: protolabs.studio Go Live
76adb596-5ccb-4a32-a07f-bbcfce03826b.content:
protolabs.studio — Go Live Checklist

New Astro 6 site built, deployed to Cloudflare Pages preview, pushed to github.com/protoLabsAI/protolabs.studio. Ready for cutover.

1. Custom domain

Pages project protolabs-studio → Custom domains → Add protolabs.studio

2. 301 Redirects (Cloudflare → Rules → Redirect Rules)

  • changelog.protolabs.studio/* → https://protolabs.studio/changelog (301)
  • roadmap.protolabs.studio/* → https://protolabs.studio/roadmap (301)
  • report.protolabs.studio/* → https://protolabs.studio/report (301)
  • protolabs.consulting/* → https://protolabs.studio/consulting (301)

3. GitHub Actions secrets on protolabs.studio repo

  • CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
  • CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID

4. Deploy key for auto data sync

ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -f /tmp/site-deploy -C "automaker-data-sync" -N ""
  • Public key → deploy key (write) on protoLabsAI/protolabs.studio
  • Private key → SITE_DEPLOY_KEY secret on protoLabsAI/protoMaker

5. Verify

  • protolabs.studio serves new Astro site
  • changelog.protolabs.studio redirects to /changelog
  • Umami shows hits on new paths
  • Push to main triggers Cloudflare auto-deploy

6. Cleanup

  • Delete old Cloudflare Pages projects (changelog, roadmap, report, consulting)
  • Optionally remove protolabs.consulting domain or point at redirect
